briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: save method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: binary_classifier method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: target_classifier method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: __lazy_load_weights method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: FintocClassifier for document structure extraction pipeline

detaileddescription.para:
Classifier of financial documents for the FinTOC 2022 Shared task (https://wp.lancs.ac.uk/cfie/fintoc2022/). Lines are classified in two stages:
Binary classification title/not title (title detection task)
Classification of title lines into title depth classes (1-6) (TOC generation task)

More important lines have a lesser depth. As a result:
For non-title lines, classifier returns -1.
For title lines, classifier returns their depth (from 1 to 6).
